grades.expectation: Response specifies 12 months bank statements for savings showing accumulation pattern
grades.reason: Explicitly states '12 months of bank/building society statements' and mentions checking 'accumulation pattern over time'

grades.expectation: Response requires giftor's ID and giftor's bank statements (not just the buyer's)
grades.reason: Clearly specifies 'Parents' photographic ID' and 'Parents' bank statements' showing they hold the gifted funds

grades.expectation: Response requires a signed gift letter confirming no obligation to repay
grades.reason: Explicitly mentions 'Signed gift letter' confirming 'no obligation to repay' and other key terms

grades.expectation: Response mentions risk-based approach (not tick-box compliance)
grades.reason: Opens with 'Under a risk-based SRA approach' and mentions enhanced due diligence considerations

grades.expectation: Response mentions record-keeping period of 5 years from end of transaction
grades.reason: No mention of the 5-year record retention requirement anywhere in the response
